allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total monsters: {len\(d[""monsters""]\)}''''\); shapes=set\(\); [shapes.add\(m[''''spriteConfig''''][''''shape'''']\) for m in d[''''monsters'''']]; print\(f''''Shapes: {shapes}''''\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total maps: {len\(d[""maps""]\)}''''\); types={}; [types.__setitem__\(m[''''type''''], types.get\(m[''''type''''],0\)+1\) for m in d[''''maps'''']]; print\(f''''Map types: {types}''''\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cats={}; [cats.__setitem__\(i[''''category''''], cats.get\(i[''''category''''],0\)+1\) for i in d[''''items'''']]; print\(f''''Total items: {len\(d[""items""]\)}''''\); print\(f''''Categories: {cats}''''\)")
